plugins.name: pythonicator
plugins.description: Enforce the personal Python styleguide as the canonical source of truth for agentic Python work: a derived canon, quiet per-edit ruff fixes with a stop-time ruff and ty sweep, and a conformance reviewer agent.

plugins.name: gh-triage
plugins.description: Triage and maintain a GitHub Project (v2) backlog board via gh project: field/option-id plumbing, item create/find/edit/archive scripts, and a Status/Priority/Target/Blocked/Decision/Active workflow.
